full_text:
Yao Zhou (Zixu) 姚伷 (子緒)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Yao Zhou (姚伷), styledZixu (子緒), was born in Ba. Zhuge Liang praised his ability to recommend good men. Yao Zhou was affiliated with Liu Zhang and the Shu Kingdom.
